summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No GitHub mutations are allowed by this job. None has the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate, and no single cluster-scoped replacement fix artifact is safe because the PRs are independent remediation items.

actions.reason: Distinct useful PR, not a duplicate of the gateway/agents/status candidates, but merge preflight is incomplete and author-followup state blocks merge recommendation.
Related to the hydrated gateway startup family but not safely mergeable or closable in this plan-only run.
Useful linked work remains related to open #68065, but failing checks and unresolved review-bot findings block merge or fixed-by-candidate planning.
Independent real bug candidate, but failed proof and non-merge-ready branch block merge; plan mode cannot close or repair it without a dedicated fix artifact.
Independent status-output cleanup, but failed proof, possible diagnostic suppression, conflicts, and unresolved review-bot findings block merge.
